## Description

What does this PR change? Why is it needed?

Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor / code cleanup
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your change.

- [ ] `npm run verify:done-reading` passes
- [ ] `npm run stress` passes
- [ ] Manual testing on broadcast + dashboard

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing code style (no comments, concise, consistent naming)
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally with a live game
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new console errors or warnings
- [ ] If adding audio/visual elements, they degrade gracefully when assets are not configured

## Additional Notes

Any deployment considerations, migration steps, or design decisions worth discussing.
